steps.title: Read the unit costs
steps.content: In the equation $26.4x+26.7y=691.2$, $x$ counts cubic yards of mulch and $y$ counts tons of gravel. So mulch costs $26.40$ dollars per cubic yard, and gravel costs $26.70$ dollars per ton.

steps.title: Subtract the unit costs
steps.content:
Find how much more the gravel costs:
$$26.70-26.40=0.30$$
The answer is 0.30.
